name: Microsoft Solitaire Collection
version_note: Windows 11 Microsoft Solitaire Collection (UWP Store app).

startup_sequence.note: Wait for new game to deal

launch.method: Use the startup_sequence above. open_app FAILS for this UWP app.
startup_issues: Browser tab ad — DON'T close browser, focus back to Solitaire.
Window title is 'Solitaire & Casual Games' not 'Solitaire'.

klondike.rules: 7 tableau columns, 4 foundations (top right), stock (top left), waste pile.
klondike.goal: Move all cards to foundations, Ace to King by suit.
tips: Double-click a card to auto-move to foundation.
Move Aces and 2s to foundations immediately.
Use H key for hints when stuck.
Press H multiple times to cycle hints.

ui_layout.stock_pile: Top-left of game area, ~x=350-450, y=300-400 fullscreen.

known_issues: open_app FAILS for this UWP app — use startup_sequence instead.
Vision model struggles to read small card values — ask specific questions.
Clicking gear icon opens settings — press Escape to close.
DO NOT declare DONE unless you made 5+ real card moves.
strategy_for_agent: 1. The startup_sequence handles launching, fullscreen, and new game automatically.
2. After startup, use look('Describe all visible cards in the 7 tableau columns.') to read the board.
3. Move Aces to foundations immediately (double_click on the Ace).
4. Look for tableau moves: alternating colors, descending rank.
5. Click stock pile (top-left) to draw when no moves available.
6. Press H for hints if stuck.
7. NEVER spend more than 1 look in a row — look once, then act.
8. NEVER declare DONE until 5+ real card moves made.
